name: PLEXUS CORP
business: Plexus partners with customers to design, manufacture and service highly complex products in demanding regulatory environments. It provides solutions to market-leading and disruptive companies globally in the Aerospace/Defense, Healthcare/Life Sciences, and Industrial market sectors. The company offers services across the product lifecycle including design, supply chain, manufacturing, and sustaining services.

catalysts.sentence: On May 14, 2025, the Board of Directors approved a share repurchase program under which we are authorized to repurchase up to $100.0 million of our common stock (the 2026 Program).
We currently estimate capital expenditures for fiscal 2026 will be approximately $90.0 million to $110.0 million to support new program ramps and replace older equipment.
